title: primula auricula subsp. hungarica
intro: Primula auricula subsp. hungarica, also known as Golden Auricula, is a subspecies of the Auricula plant, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the primrose family. The Golden Auricula has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The Golden Auricula can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
